name: Potential RCE Exploitation Attempt In NodeJS
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Moti Harmats
SIGMA Title: Potential RCE Exploitation Attempt In NodeJS
SIGMA Description: Detects process execution related errors in NodeJS. If the exceptions are caused due to user input then they may suggest an RCE vulnerability.

False positives:
- Puppeteer invocation exceptions often contain child_process related errors, that doesn't necessarily mean that the app is vulnerable.

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%node:child_process%' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Potential RCE Exploitation Attempt In NodeJS on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event matches LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%node:child_process%' AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Potential RCE Exploitation Attempt In NodeJS
